name: Improper Neutralization of Encoded URI Schemes in a Web Page
description: The product does not neutralize user-controlled input containing URI-encoded script payloads (e.g., '%6a%61%76%61%73%63%72%69%70%74%3a' for 'javascript:'), allowing attackers to bypass XSS filters by encoding malicious URIs.
detection_pattern: INGRESS node provides URI-encoded input that bypasses a CONTROL[xss_filter] checking for literal 'javascript:' strings, but the browser decodes the URI before execution at EGRESS[html_output], enabling script injection
